name: Boiled Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. To the milk, add the three egg yolks and one egg white; reserve the other two egg whites.
2. Add sugar to which the flour has been added and cook in a double boiler until slightly thickened. It will be thicker when it cools.
3. Beat the remaining two egg whites and fold into the hot custard. The custard added to egg whites makes a smoother custard than egg whites added to custard.
4. Add vanilla and chill.
This recipe was my great-grandmother Bessie's, which my grandmother still makes at Christmas. Excellent with just a little nutmeg sprinkled on top.
